title: NaNFix
body:
When the minecraft summon a NaN entity.

The server logs like this:

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7b6eae2fa0803b5a6dc7aea0e249bd3c3ee6168.png)

 

This mod will remove the NaN entity to avoid huge log files.

How the mod works:

When a entity was set to NaN rotation, the mod will remove the errored entity.

Attention: This may result in the **deletion** of some of the entities in your save.
